title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #1, Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no way you actually lost, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are we supposed to do now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Does that mean we've already lost?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel as good as new after eating the Dango speed gave me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's insane that all the best cookies were crushed after joining forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kaido-Sama's dominance is just over- wheelming!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that announcement was meant to hurt our morale.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed, we have no way of verifying it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dumb bastards! They've all lost the will to fight anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How disappointing! You were all fired up earlier, so I thought I'd play along!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kukuki... When the "general" falls, all the paws lose their composure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HE'S LAUNCHED ANOTHER VOLLEY OF ARROWS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no use! There's nowhere to take cover! Please have mercy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this point, you just look like Tender Venison!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 33 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
